SHAREHOLDERS AGREEMENT

This Shareholders Agreement ("Agreement") is made and entered into as of the 15th day of September, 2023, by and among the following parties:

1. **Dr. Alex Tan**, NRIC: S2345678B, residing at 123 Orchard Road, Singapore 234567, contact number: +65 6123 4567, email: alex.tan@fictmail.sg.

2. **Ms. Clara Lim**, NRIC: S3456789C, residing at 456 Raffles Place, Singapore 345678, contact number: +65 6234 5678, email: clara.lim@fictmail.sg.

3. **Quantum Innovations Pte Ltd**, UEN: 201345678W, having its registered office at 789 Marina Bay, Singapore 567890, contact number: +65 6345 6789, email: info@quantuminnov.sg.

RECITALS:

WHEREAS, the Parties wish to enter into this Agreement to set forth the terms and conditions of their relationship as shareholders in Quantum Innovations Pte Ltd, with an initial capital investment of SGD 500,000.
